title: region_hitboxes sidecar (<variant_id>_hitbox.json) -- the bake-consumed dialect
description: The authoritative per-region world-space AABB map a delivery ships alongside the glb. bake_asset._explicit_region_path reads `region_hitboxes` (name -> {min,max} in metres, the model's Z-up frame); calib_color.py + ADR-0036 region baking consume it. Distinct from the verification-only hitbox_v1 schema (regions/aabb_min/aabb_max).

region_hitboxes.description: region name -> world-space AABB. Calibration models name regions so they fold (calib_spec.calib_color_key) to head/torso/arm_left/arm_right/legs/tail.
